list.name: tag
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "plc4x_raw", tag: "alias", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_tags" and r.device == "${device}")

targets.query:
from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_tags")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.alias == "${tag}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_forecast")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.alias == "${tag}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "predicted")

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_forecast")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.alias == "${tag}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "upper_bound")

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_forecast")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.alias == "${tag}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "lower_bound")

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_anomaly")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.alias == "${tag}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "score")

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_trend")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.alias == "${tag}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rate_per_hour")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_anomaly")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.alias == "${tag}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "is_anomaly")
  |> last()
